title: cirsium × ochroleucum
intro: Cirsium × ochroleucum, also known as the yellow plume thistle, is a rare hybrid species of the thistle family, derived from the cross of Cirsium vulgare and Cirsium ochroleucum. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, containing anti-inflammatory compounds such as flavonoids and sesquiterpenes, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cirsium × ochroleucum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. The herbal preparations of Cirsium × ochroleucum typically involve drying and processing the plant's flowers and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
